name: Turks and Caicos Islands (civil ensign)
description: A British Red Ensign with the Union Flag in the canton, defaced in the fly with the coat of arms of the Turks and Caicos Islands — a yellow shield with a conch shell, a Caribbean lobster, and a Turk's-cap cactus.
history: The civil ensign of the Turks and Caicos Islands is the Red Ensign defaced with the territorial coat of arms (granted in 1968).

features.role: Coat of arms of the Turks and Caicos Islands
